note_text:
PROCEDURE NOTE
0- Chest tube
[ ] Tunneled Pleural Catheter
Narrative mentions: chest tube present.
Narrative mentions: PleurX catheter present.

FINDINGS:
Known airway stent well positioned and patent.

PROCEDURE:
Navigational bronchoscopy was performed.
Target 1: RUL nodule
Forceps biopsies x3
Target 2: RLL nodule
Forceps biopsies x2

PROCEDURE:
Linear EBUS performed.
Site 1: station 11L - 8mm node
The site was sampled with TBNA.

PROCEDURE IN DETAIL:
Linear EBUS was performed.
Station 7 lymph node 6 mm sampled with 4 passes.
Station 11L lymph node 9 mm sampled with 3 passes.

PROCEDURE IN DETAIL:
New Uniblocker (5Fr) balloon occlusion was performed at the Left Carina (LC2).
The endobronchial blocker balloon was left inflated in the LUL.

PROCEDURE IN DETAIL:
Amphotericin 0.4mg was instilled into the RUL lesion.
Amphotericin 0.2mg was instilled into the RML lesion.

PROCEDURE IN DETAIL:
Transbronchial cryobiopsy was performed in the RLL.
Cold saline was available to control any distal bleeding should bleeding occur.
No active bleeding was seen at the end of the procedure.
COMPLICATIONS: None.
EBL: 5 mL.

PROCEDURES: Bronchoscopy with BAL; Linear EBUS-TBNA of mediastinal/hilar lymph nodes (include codes: CPT 31624, 31652)
FINDINGS:
EBUS: Enlarged station 4R and station 7 with heterogeneous echotexture; station 11L small but visualized.
PROCEDURE IN DETAIL:
BAL was performed in the right upper lobe posterior segment with 120 mL instilled, 48 mL returned.
EBUS-TBNA sampling:
Station 4R: 5 passes with 22G needle
Station 7: 6 passes with 22G needle
Station 11L: 3 passes with 22G needle
SPECIMENS:

"4R TBNA" (passes 1-5)

"7 TBNA" (passes 1-6)

"11L TBNA" (passes 1-3)

"RUL BAL"
